scripts.build: pnpm --filter @code-insights/cli build && pnpm --filter @code-insights/server build && pnpm --filter @code-insights/dashboard build
scripts.test:automation: bash automation/tests/cli-build.test.sh && bash automation/tests/maintenance.test.sh && bash automation/tests/throttled-analysis.test.sh && bash automation/tests/throttled-lock.test.sh && bash automation/tests/install-launchd.test.sh
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @code-insights/cli build && pnpm --filter @code-insights/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @code-insights/dashboard typecheck
